name: Angel Hair Pasta with Whipped Cream and Porcini
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the porcini in a small bowl and cover with 1/2 cup warm water. Allow to soak for 45 minutes. Drain, reserving the liquid.
2. Heat a large frying pan. Add the oil and shallots, and sauté for 1 minute.
3. Add the fresh mushrooms and continue sautéing until tender.
4. Chop the porcini coarsely and add to the frying pan, along with the reserved liquid. Simmer until most of the liquid is evaporated.
5. Bring a large pot of water (with a pinch of salt) to boil.
6. In a separate bowl, whip the cream until it holds soft peaks. Refrigerate the whipped cream.
7. Cook the angel hair pasta in the boiling water until al dente. Drain well and return the drained pasta to the pot.
8. Add the mushroom mixture, Parmesan cheese, whipped cream, and season with salt and pepper to taste to the pasta.
9. Using a large spatula, quickly fold all ingredients together without stirring too vigorously so the whipped cream doesn't collapse entirely. You may save a bit of the whipped cream for garnishing.
10. Serve immediately.
